name: Angel Fire Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Angel Fire Community Center in Angel Fire, NM! There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Angel Fire Resort
description: Angel Fire Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Angel Fire, NM. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: Angel Fire Rv Resort
description: Angel Fire Rv Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Angel Fire, NM. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Moreno Valley High School
description:
Bring your own net, balls etc.  permanent lines and concrete surface.  No fencing around court,
No wind screens, this court is out in the wide open. Best for the highschool day play.
hours: 8:00-4:15 (Tues-Fri) Apply Now © 2025 Moreno Valley Preporatory | All rights reserved. Terms of Use Privacy Policy
